title: SSR Marker-Assisted Backcross Introgression of QTLs for Host Plant Resistance to Artherigona Soccata in Sorghum Bicolor
abstract: The present study entitled “SSR marker-assisted backcross introgression of QTL for host plant resistance to Artherigona soccata in Sorghum Bicolor” was aimed at the transfer and validation of putative QTL shoot fly resistance from donor parent IS 18551, which were mapped in previous studies, into the genetics backgrounds of elite hybrid of Parental lines BTx623 and 296B…......
funders: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
Council of Scientific and Industrial Research(India)
